recommendations.title: 10,000 BC
recommendations.overview: A prehistoric epic that follows a young mammoth hunter's journey through uncharted territory to secure the future of his tribe.

recommendations.title: Plankton: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Plankton's tangled love story with his sentient computer wife goes sideways when she takes a stand — and decides to destroy the world without him.

recommendations.title: Star Trek Beyond
recommendations.overview: The USS Enterprise crew explores the furthest reaches of uncharted space, where they encounter a mysterious new enemy who puts them and everything the Federation stands for to the test.

recommendations.title: Lost in Space
recommendations.overview: The prospects for continuing life on Earth in the year 2058 are grim. So the Robinsons are launched into space to colonize Alpha Prime, the only other inhabitable planet in the galaxy. But when a stowaway sabotages the mission, the Robinsons find the

recommendations.title: Alien: Romulus
recommendations.overview: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.

recommendations.title: Toy Story That Time Forgot
recommendations.overview: During a post-Christmas play date, the gang find themselves in uncharted territory when the coolest set of action figures ever turn out to be dangerously delusional. It's all up to Trixie, the triceratops, if the gang hopes to return to Bonnie's room

recommendations.title: Alien: Covenant
recommendations.overview: The crew of the colony ship Covenant, bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, discovers what they think is an uncharted paradise but is actually a dark, dangerous world.

recommendations.title: Uranus 2324
recommendations.overview: Bonded in their youth and separated by tragedy, an astronaut and a free diver bend the laws of space and time in their efforts to be together again.

recommendations.title: Serenity
recommendations.overview: When the renegade crew of Serenity agrees to hide a fugitive on their ship, they find themselves in an action-packed battle between the relentless military might of a totalitarian regime who will destroy anything – or anyone – to get the girl back an

recommendations.title: V/H/S/Beyond
recommendations.overview: The infinite playground of forbidden worlds and dangerous lifeforms offered by the sci-fi horror genre will lead to the biggest, maddest, bloodiest V/H/S ever.
recommendations.director: Justin Long, Kate Siegel, Justin Martinez, Jay Cheel, Virat Pal, Christian Long, Jordan Downey
